sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni se smatraju veoma važnim u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones are considered very important in our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَسْتَخْدِمُهَا لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ih za komunikaciju s prijateljima i traženje informacija.
sentences.translationEn: We use them to communicate with friends and search for information.

sentences.arabic: يُنَزِّلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ تَطْبِيقَاتٍ مُفِيدَةً لِلتَّعَلُّمِ وَالْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi preuzimaju korisne aplikacije za učenje i rad.
sentences.translationEn: Many people download useful applications for learning and work.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ اسْتِخْدَامُ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةِ بِاعْتِدَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je koristiti ove uređaje umjereno.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to use these devices moderately.
